dataset: LIDC-IDRI (Lung Image Database Consortium and Infectious Disease Research Institute)
privileged_info_summary: The task uses real medical imaging data from the LIDC-IDRI collection (Patient LIDC-IDRI-0001). Clinical standards for adult transverse cardiac diameter typically range from 95 mm to 165 mm, and internal thoracic diameter typically ranges from 224 mm to 330 mm. The claimed ranges of 80-200 mm and 200-400 mm respectively serve as inclusive bounding boxes for these physiological measurements.
